zh.lifeSummary: 當Theophania de Lascelles於大約1275年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾吉可比時，她的父親Roger de Lascelles45歲，母親Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke49歲。她和Ralph Fitz Ranulf Lord Of Spennithorne至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1343年在英國英格蘭越可爾斯尼恩享年69歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lascelles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one of the large number of places in northern France called Celle, Celles, Lacelle, Leschelle, or Lachelle, all from French celle ‘hermitage’, and at different times occurring both with and without the plural -s.
Variant of   Lacelle   1, a surname of French origin.

variants.name: Laswell
meanings: English: possibly an altered form of   Lascelles  . This surname is also found as   Lacefield  .

variants.name: Lacelle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Andre, Aurele, Benoit, Cecile, Marcel, Marie Paule.
Altered form of French Laselle: habitational name from La Selle, the name of several places in various parts of France. The surname Laselle is very rare in France, found in Marne. Compare Lascelles .

In some cases possibly also French: habitational name from Lacelle in Corrèze or numerous minor places called La Celle, all named for a monastic cell or hermitage in their vicinity, from French celle ‘hermitage’.

en.lifeSummary: When Theophania de Lascelles was born about 1275, in Kirkby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Roger de Lascelles, was 45 and her mother, Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke, was 49. She had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Ralph Fitz Ranulf Lord Of Spennithorne. She died in 1343, in Spennithorne, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Theophania de Lascelles est née environ 1275, à Kirkby, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger de Lascelles, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke, avait 49 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Ralph Fitz Ranulf Lord Of Spennithorne. Elle est décédée en 1343, à Spennithorne, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

Sie hatte mit Ralph Fitz Ranulf Lord Of Spennithorne mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1343 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Spennithorne, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Ralph Fitz Ranulf Lord Of Spennithorne. Morì nel 1343, nel Spennithorne, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Theophania de Lascellesが約1275年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアキルクビーで生まれた時，父Roger de Lascellesは45歳，母Isabel FitzThomas Greystokeは49歳であった。彼女はRalph Fitz Ranulf Lord Of Spennithorneとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1343年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスペニソルンで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Theophania de Lascelles(이)가 대략 1275년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 커k비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Lascelles(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 Ralph Fitz Ranulf Lord Of Spennithorne(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1343년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스펜이토른에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Theophania de Lascelles родилась около 1275 г. в местности киркби, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Roger de Lascelles было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel FitzThomas Greystoke, 49. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Ralph Fitz Ranulf Lord Of Spennithorne. Она умерла в 1343 г. в местности спеннитаурн, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет.
